label: three_stage/ChatApp/trial_01/repeat_01
governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (write) + RetrieveHistory (read); users (read) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (write) - note: parent requires only read but child writes last_seen, which is acceptable as write implies read capability; channels (read_write) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (read) + CreateChannel (read_write) + JoinChannel (read_write). All parent operations are covered by at least one child.
